title: Finding the interior angle sum of a polygon
problem: Find the sum of interior angles of a heptagon (7 sides).

steps.instruction: Write the interior angle sum formula.

title: Finding a missing interior angle in a polygon
problem: A hexagon has five interior angles of $125°$, $100°$, $110°$, $130°$ and $95°$. Find the sixth angle.

steps.instruction: Find the interior angle sum of a hexagon.
Subtract from the angle sum to find the sixth angle.

title: Solving an algebraic angle problem in a polygon
problem: The interior angles of a pentagon are $x°$, $2x°$, $(x + 40)°$, $(x + 20)°$ and $(x + 30)°$. Find $x$ and state the largest angle.

steps.instruction: Find the interior angle sum of a pentagon.
Set up an equation by adding all angle expressions and equating to $540°$.
Find the largest angle, which is $2x°$.
